finding: Lay judgment of intentionality asymmetrically depends on moral valence: observers rate harmful side effects as more intentional than equally-foreknown beneficial side effects. This asymmetry correlates with blame/praise assignment rather than pure causal reasoning about the agent's mental state.

Across 32 countries, men's task avoidance in female-typed household chores follows a hierarchical order (laundry hardest to do, sick-care easiest). Educational gap in task-participation narrows under high unemployment, widens under poor GDP growth. Conformity to the hierarchy weakest in Northern Europe, strongest in Southern Europe.

Economic crisis shifts EU framing: high unemployment reduces positive framing more among high-educated citizens (pre-crisis winners); GDP contraction affects low-educated citizens (losers). EU financial-stability program increases communitarian (sovereignty-threat) framing. Political salience of EU issue increases positive and decreases negative framing.

Higher parental socioeconomic status delays union formation across 25 European countries, especially for direct marriage over cohabitation. Effect is partially mediated by offspring education but remains significant for women. Cross-national variation in strength disappears after controlling for offspring education; countries advanced in demographic-transition show weaker parental influence.

Conference session compendium: motivation for daily activities clusters into three factors (eudaimonic, hedonic, external); older adults show increased selectivity toward emotionally meaningful activities and higher kin-selection in charitable giving; time-horizon constraints amplify age differences in goal motives (toward emotional satisfaction and transcendence in the very old).

A brief proactive-coping course for newly diagnosed Type 2 diabetes patients significantly improves proactive self-management skills, goal achievement, and self-efficacy compared to control. Effect driven by structured five-step planning (goal-setting, barrier-anticipation, strategy-generation, implementation-intention writing, progress-monitoring) and peer-support.
